rationale: Bug hunt C16 discovered PHANTOM implementation: C16 status files claimed echo_memory+tension_zone+convergence_zone were wired into LLM context, but actual code (llm_adapter_prompts.gd build_context_enrichment + merlin_llm_adapter.gd build_narrative_context) was NEVER edited. Same class of ghost-commit as C8/C9. BUGFIX-027 completes the actual wiring. Also added 3rd GM few-shot example per creator answer q-20260415-005 (B: 3 examples with end-game). Discovered and fixed PROGRESS_MISSION parser bug — _try_parse_effects_dict rejected all PROGRESS_MISSION effects from LLM because it required 'amount' key but PROGRESS_MISSION uses 'step'.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C17 (verify echo_memory flow end-to-end: store_run populates -> save_system persists -> build_narrative_context reads -> build_context_enrichment formats). Then feature: GFC wrap BroceliandeForest3D (q-20260415-011) or keyboard/gamepad navigation (q-20260415-004).
